title: apply_patch executes and persists with new metadata shape
description: Model calls apply_patch; tool produces patch + diff; processor persists tool part to SQLite. New shape omits before/after.

messages.label: parse patch; for each touched file:
(NEW) fileMeta := { filePath, relativePath, type, diff: fileDiff, additions, deletions, movePath? } — NO before/after
return { output, title, metadata: { phase, files: fileMeta[], diff: totalDiff, diagnostics } }
Session.updatePart({ ..., state: { status, input, output, metadata, title } })

title: UI renders apply_patch part (new shape, hunk-driven)
description: Web UI loads a session containing an apply_patch part with new metadata; message-part component renders the diff via the existing diff component, feeding hunk-format input.

messages.label: part: { type:'tool', tool:'apply_patch', state:{ metadata:{ files:[{ filePath, diff, additions, deletions }] } } }

title: UI renders legacy apply_patch part (old shape, still works)
description: Web UI loads a session created before this change; metadata still carries before/after; UI ignores them and renders via the same hunk path.

messages.label: part: { ..., metadata:{ files:[{ filePath, diff, before, after, additions, deletions }] } }
